name: accounting firms using QuickBooks for 10-50 clients tool
description: For accounting firms using QuickBooks for 10-50 clients, manual calculations cause delays in financial reporting. We automate depreciation schedule generation instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.

problem_solved: Manual calculations of fixed asset depreciation schedules are time-consuming and error-prone.
